home.subtext: Honest reviews from real viewers. Find creators you can trust.
home.viewerStep3: Give them an honest review (1-5 stars)
home.viewerStep4: Help other viewers find quality creators
home.creatorStep1: Create a creator profile for free
home.creatorStep3: Buy a subscription to reply to reviews
home.ctaSubtext: It's free and takes less than 2 minutes

auth.creatorInfo: As a creator you can create your profile and receive reviews from viewers.
auth.forgotSubtext: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.forgotSuccess: Check your inbox! We've sent you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetSubtext: Your new password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetSuccess: Your password has been updated! Redirecting...
auth.resetError: Something went wrong. Please request a new link.
auth.planSubtitle: You can always change plan later.
auth.basicDesc: Reply to reviews older than 1 month

creators.title: Explore Creators
creators.subtitle: Find and review creators based on your experience
creators.notFoundSub: Create a placeholder profile so viewers can review them now
creators.noCreatorsSub: Try a different search or category

creatorDetail.claimSubtitle: This profile was created by viewers. Take it over and get full control.
creatorDetail.noReviewsSub: Be the first to review this creator
creatorDetail.alreadyReviewed: You have already reviewed this creator.

review.reviewPlaceholder: Describe your experience with this creator. What makes them good or bad? What can other viewers expect?
review.platformHint: Optional — where did you discover this creator?
review.alreadyReviewed: You have already reviewed this creator.
review.cantReviewSelf: You cannot review your own profile.

claim.subtitle: This profile was created by viewers. Take it over and get full control.
claim.needCreatorAccount: You need to create a creator account to take over this profile.
claim.createAndClaim: Create creator account and take over
claim.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
claim.notCreatorMsg: You're logged in as a viewer. You need a creator account to take over profiles.
claim.warningText: By taking over you confirm you are {name}. False claims may result in account deletion.
claim.confirmSubtext: Your username must match the profile URL "{slug}"

dashboard.title: Creator Dashboard
dashboard.buySubscriptionMsg: Buy a subscription to reply to reviews
dashboard.noReviewsSub: Share your profile to get your first reviews

setup.title: Create Creator Profile
setup.subtitle: Tell your viewers who you are
setup.bioPlaceholder: Tell about yourself and your content...
setup.platformLinksHint: At least one required. Your username on the platform must match your profile URL.
setup.slugTaken: This slug is already taken. Choose a different name.
setup.atLeastOneLink: You must provide at least one platform link (YouTube, Instagram or TikTok)
setup.invalidLink: Invalid {platform} link. Use the format: youtube.com/@yourname
setup.handleMismatch: Your {platform} username "@{handle}" does not match the profile URL "{slug}"
setup.ownershipDisclaimer: By creating you confirm you own the listed profiles

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Choose the subscription that suits you best
subscription.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? You'll keep access until {date}.

common.disputePlaceholder: Describe why this review is incorrect or inappropriate...
common.subscriptionRequired: You need an active subscription to reply to reviews.
common.basicRestriction: With the Basic subscription you can only reply to reviews older than 1 month.
